Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************

 Cocompleteness of the category of algebras

 In this file, we look at the cocompleteness of the category of
 algebras for a monad. We proceed in the following steps.

 We start by looking when the category of algbras has reflexive
 coequalizers. This is the case if the monad preserves reflexive
 coequalizers. Note that this holds more generally (although we do
 not formalize that): if a monad preserves a class of colimits,
 then the category of algebras also has that class of colimits.

 The next step is to construct coproducts in the category of
 algebras, and this is where the main work happens. Here we
 assume that the category of algebras has reflexive coequalizers.

 Finally, we conclude cocompleteness, and for that, it suffices to
 construct coequalizers. Here we use a general statement: if a
 category has reflexive coequalizers and binary coproducts, then
 it also has coequalizers.

 Concluding, if the category of algebras has reflexive
 coequalizers, then it is cocomplete. Note that reflexive
 coequalizers are colimits, so these two statements are in fact
 equivalent.

 Note that the underlying assumption in this whole story is that
 the category of algebras has reflexive coequalizers, which is the
 case if the monad preserves reflexive coequalizers. It is
 worthwhile to note that every finitary monad preserves reflexive
 coequalizers. As such, the category of algebras for every finitary
 algebraic theory is thus cocomplete.

 Contents
 1. Reflexive coequalizers in the Eilenberg-Moore category
 2. Binary Coproducts
 3. Coequalizers

 *****************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.All.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Structures.CartesianStructure.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Structures.StructureLimitsAndColimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.AlgebraStructures.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section MonadToStruct.
  Context (M : Monad SET).

  
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
Coequalizer (# M f) (# M g)

  
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
Coequalizer (# M f) (# M g)

    
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
Coequalizer (# M f) (# M g)

    
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
Coequalizer (# M f) (# M g)

    
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
# M f · pr2 (M C,, # M π) = # M g · pr2 (M C,, # M π)
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
(λ H : # M f · pr2 (M C,, # M π) =
       # M g · pr2 (M C,, # M π),
 isCoequalizer (# M f) (# M g) (pr2 (M C,, # M π)) H)
  ?pr1

    
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
# M f · pr2 (M C,, # M π) = # M g · pr2 (M C,, # M π)
 abstract
        (refine (!(functor_comp M _ _) @ _ @ functor_comp M _ _) ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         exact (CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET _ _ f g))).
    
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
(λ H : # M f · pr2 (M C,, # M π) =
       # M g · pr2 (M C,, # M π),
 isCoequalizer (# M f) (# M g) (pr2 (M C,, # M π)) H)
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_subproof X Y f g)
 
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
σ · f = identity Y
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
σ · g = identity Y

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
σ · f = identity Y
 abstract
          (use funextsec ;
           exact pf).
      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
σ · g = identity Y
 abstract
          (use funextsec ;
           exact pg).
  Defined.

pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
# M (# M f) · pr2 (M (M C),, # M (# M π)) =

M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
(λ H : # M (# M f) · pr2 (M (M C),, # M (# M π)) =
       # M (# M g) · pr2 (M (M C),, # M (# M π)),
 isCoequalizer (# M (# M f)) (# M (# M g))
   (pr2 (M (M C),, # M (# M π))) H) ?pr1

    
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
# M (# M f) · pr2 (M (M C),, # M (# M π)) =
# M (# M g) · pr2 (M (M C),, # M (# M π))
 abstract
        (refine (!(functor_comp M _ _) @ _ @ functor_comp M _ _) ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         refine (!(functor_comp M _ _) @ _ @ functor_comp M _ _) ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         exact (CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET _ _ f g))).
    
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
(λ H : # M (# M f) · pr2 (M (M C),, # M (# M π)) =
       # M (# M g) · pr2 (M (M C),, # M (# M π)),
 isCoequalizer (# M (# M f)) (# M (# M g))
   (pr2 (M (M C),, # M (# M π))) H)
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2_subproof X Y f g)

HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M

pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g ⟧
# M σ · # M f = identity (M Y)

 abstract
          (refine (!(functor_comp M _ _) @ _ @ functor_id M _) ;

HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M

σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

σ · g = identity Y

            (use funextsec ;
             exact pg).
  Defined.

  (**
   1. Reflexive coequalizers in the Eilenberg-Moore category
   *)
  Section ReflexiveCoequalizers.
    Context (HM : preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M).

    Section ReflexiveCoequalizerConstruction.
      Context {X Y : hSet}
              {hX : monad_algebra M X}
              {hY : monad_algebra M Y}
              {f g : SET ⟦ X , Y ⟧}
              (hf : hX · f = # M f · hY)
              (hg : hX · g = # M g · hY)
              {σ : SET ⟦ Y , X ⟧}
              (hσ : hY · σ = #M σ · hX)
              (pf : ∏ (y : Y), f(σ y) = y)
              (pg : ∏ (y : Y), g(σ y) = y).

      Let AX : category_of_monad_algebra M := X ,, hX.
      Let AY : category_of_monad_algebra M := Y ,, hY.
      Let Af : AX --> AY := f ,, hf.
      Let Ag : AX --> AY := g ,, hg.
      Let Aσ : AY --> AX := σ ,, hσ.

      Let C : hSet := pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET _ _ f g).
      Let π : SET ⟦ Y , C ⟧ := CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET _ _ f g).
      Let Cp : f · π = g · π
        := CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET _ _ f g).
      Let Coeq : Coequalizer _ _
        := Coequalizers_HSET _ _ f g.

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
SET ⟦ M C, C ⟧

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
SET ⟦ M C, C ⟧

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
SET ⟦ M Y, C ⟧
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
# M f · ?h = # M g · ?h

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
SET ⟦ M Y, C ⟧
 exact (hY · π).
        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
# M f · (hY · π) = # M g · (hY · π)
 abstract
            (rewrite !assoc ;
             rewrite <- hf, <- hg ;
             rewrite !assoc' ;
             rewrite Cp ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
monad_algebra_laws M
  monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor

HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M

hY: monad_algebra M Y

σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧

pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M

Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧

C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π

monad_algebra_laws M
  monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
η M C · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor =
identity C
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
μ M C · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor =
# M monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor
· monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
η M C · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor =
identity C
 
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
CoequalizerArrow Coeq
· (η M C · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor) =
CoequalizerArrow Coeq · identity C

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
CoequalizerArrow Coeq
· (η M C · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor) =
CoequalizerArrow Coeq

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
CoequalizerArrow Coeq
· (η M C
   · CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof) =
CoequalizerArrow Coeq

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
CoequalizerArrow Coeq · η M C
· CoequalizerOut
    (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
    (hY · π)
    monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof =
CoequalizerArrow Coeq

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
CoequalizerArrow Coeq · η M C
· CoequalizerOut
    (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
    (hY · π)
    monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof =
?b
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
?b = CoequalizerArrow Coeq

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
CoequalizerArrow Coeq · η M C
· CoequalizerOut
    (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
    (hY · π)
    monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof =
?b

            
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
CoequalizerArrow Coeq · η M C = ?y'

            exact (nat_trans_ax (η M) _ _ (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)).
          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
η M Y · # M (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
· CoequalizerOut
    (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
    (hY · π)
    monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof =
CoequalizerArrow Coeq

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
η M Y
· (# M (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
   · CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof) =
CoequalizerArrow Coeq

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
η M Y
· (# M (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
   · CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof) =
?b
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
?b = CoequalizerArrow Coeq

· (# M (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)

M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
# M (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
· CoequalizerOut
    (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
    (hY · π)
    monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof =
?t2

            apply (CoequalizerCommutes (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer _ _ _)).
          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
η M Y · (hY · π) = CoequalizerArrow Coeq

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
η M Y · hY · π = CoequalizerArrow Coeq

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
identity (functor_identity SET Y) · π =
CoequalizerArrow Coeq

          apply id_left.
        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
μ M C · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor =
# M monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor
· monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor
 
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
CoequalizerArrow
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2 HM pf pg)
· (μ M C · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor) =
CoequalizerArrow
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2 HM pf pg)
· (# M monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor
   · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor)

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
CoequalizerArrow
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2 HM pf pg)
· (μ M C
   · CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof) =
CoequalizerArrow
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2 HM pf pg)
· (# M
     (CoequalizerOut
        (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
        (hY · π)
        monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof)
   · CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof)

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π

CoequalizerArrow
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2 HM pf pg) · μ M C
· CoequalizerOut
    (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
    (hY · π)
    monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof =
CoequalizerArrow
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2 HM pf pg)
· # M
    (CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof)
· CoequalizerOut
    (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
    (hY · π)
    monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof

M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M

Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
?b =
CoequalizerArrow
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2 HM pf pg)
· # M
    (CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof)
· CoequalizerOut
    (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
    (hY · π)
    monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof

hY: monad_algebra M Y

pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π

CoequalizerArrow
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2 HM pf pg) · μ M C

    (hY · π)

HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M

hY: monad_algebra M Y

pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M

Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π

· (# M (CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g))
   · CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof) =
CoequalizerArrow
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2 HM pf pg)
· (# M
     (CoequalizerOut
        (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
        (hY · π)
        monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof)
   · CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof)

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
μ M Y
· (# M (CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g))
   · CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof) =
?b

HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧

σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧

pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π

?b =
CoequalizerArrow
  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2 HM pf pg)
· (# M
     (CoequalizerOut
        (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
        (hY · π)
        monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof)
   · CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof)

pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M

Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧

μ M Y
· (# M (CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g))
   · CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof) =
?b

            
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
# M (CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g))
· CoequalizerOut
    (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
    (hY · π)
    monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof =
?t2

            apply (CoequalizerCommutes (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer _ _ _)).

HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X

  (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer_2 HM pf pg)

   · CoequalizerOut

π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
# M hY · # M π
· CoequalizerOut
    (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
    (hY · π)
    monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof =
# M hY · hY · π

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
# M hY
· (# M π
   · CoequalizerOut
       (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
       (hY · π)
       monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof) =
# M hY · (hY · π)

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
# M π
· CoequalizerOut
    (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg) C
    (hY · π)
    monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor_subproof =
hY · π

          apply (CoequalizerCommutes (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer _ _ _)).
      Qed.

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧

π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
monad_algebra M (coequalizer_hSet f g)

M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY

σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧

π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
SET ⟦ M (coequalizer_hSet f g), coequalizer_hSet f g ⟧
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M

hX: monad_algebra M X

hg: hX · g = # M g · hY

pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M

Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
monad_algebra_laws M ?f

pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

 exact monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor.
        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
monad_algebra_laws M
  monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor
 exact monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_laws.
      Defined.

      Definition monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob
        : category_of_monad_algebra M
        := C ,, monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra.

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob ⟧

category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob ⟧

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
pr2 AY -->[ π] pr2 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob

        abstract
          (refine (!_) ;
           apply (CoequalizerCommutes (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer _ _ _))).
      Defined.

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
Af · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow =
Ag · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π

Af · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow =
Ag · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
isPredicate
  (mor_disp (pr2 AX)
     (pr2 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob))
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
pr1 (Af · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow) =
pr1 (Ag · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow)

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
isPredicate
  (mor_disp (pr2 AX)
     (pr2 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob))

          intro ; apply homset_property.
        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
pr1 (Af · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow) =
pr1 (Ag · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow)

        exact Cp.
      Qed.

      Section UMP.
        Context {W : hSet}
                (hW : monad_algebra M W)
                {l : Y → W}
                (hl : hY · l = #M l · hW)
                (p : f · l = g · l).

        Let AW : category_of_monad_algebra M := W ,, hW.

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
isaprop
  (∑
   φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
       ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
   monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl)

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
isaprop
  (∑
   φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
       ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
   monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl)

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑
   φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
       ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
   monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl)

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl
φ₁ = φ₂

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl
isPredicate
  (λ x : category_of_monad_algebra M
         ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
   monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · x = l,, hl)
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧

hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl
isPredicate
  (λ x : category_of_monad_algebra M
         ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
   monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · x = l,, hl)

            
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl
x: category_of_monad_algebra M
⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧
isaprop
  (monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · x = l,, hl)

            apply homset_property.
          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl
isPredicate
  (mor_disp (pr2 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob)
     (pr2 AW))
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY

hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π

hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,

M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl
isPredicate
  (mor_disp (pr2 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob)
     (pr2 AW))

            
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl
x: SET ⟦ pr1 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, pr1 AW ⟧
isaprop
  (pr2 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob -->[ x] pr2 AW)

            apply homset_property.
          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl
pr11 φ₁ = pr11 φ₂

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = l,, hl
CoequalizerArrow Coeq · pr11 φ₁ =
CoequalizerArrow Coeq · pr11 φ₂

          exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁ @ !(pr2 φ₂))).
        Qed.

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
category_of_monad_algebra M
⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
category_of_monad_algebra M
⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, AW ⟧

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π

W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
SET ⟦ pr1 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, pr1 AW ⟧
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
(λ f : SET ⟦ pr1 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob,
       pr1 AW ⟧,
 pr2 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob -->[ f] pr2 AW)
  ?pr1

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
SET ⟦ pr1 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, pr1 AW ⟧
 exact (CoequalizerOut Coeq _ l p).
          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
(λ f : SET ⟦ pr1 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob,
       pr1 AW ⟧,
 pr2 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob -->[ f] pr2 AW)
  (CoequalizerOut Coeq W l p)
 abstract
              (use (CoequalizerOutsEq (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg)) ;
               refine (assoc _ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor _ @ _) ;
               unfold monad_reflexive_coequalizer_algebra_mor ;
               rewrite !assoc ;
               rewrite (CoequalizerCommutes (monad_on_reflexive_coequalizer HM pf pg)) ;
               rewrite !assoc' ;
               rewrite (CoequalizerCommutes Coeq) ;
               refine (hl @ _) ;
               rewrite !assoc ;
               refine (maponpaths (λ z, z · _) (!_)) ;
               refine (!(functor_comp M _ _) @ _) ;
               apply maponpaths ;
               apply (CoequalizerCommutes Coeq)).
        Defined.

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow
· monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ump_mor = l,, hl

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
