hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow
· monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ump_mor = l,, hl

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 AY) (pr2 AW))
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
pr1
  (monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow
   · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ump_mor) =
pr1 (l,, hl)

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 AY) (pr2 AW))

            intro ; apply homset_property.
          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: hSet
hW: monad_algebra M W
l: Y → W
hl: hY · l = # M l · hW
p: f · l = g · l
AW:= W,, hW: category_of_monad_algebra M
pr1
  (monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow
   · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ump_mor) =
pr1 (l,, hl)

          apply idpath.
        Qed.
      End UMP.

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
Coequalizer Af Ag

M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, ?w ⟧
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
Af · ?e = Ag · ?e
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
isCoequalizer Af Ag ?e ?H

        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
category_of_monad_algebra M
 exact monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob.
        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob ⟧
 exact monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow.
        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
Af · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow =
Ag · monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow
 exact monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow_eq.
        
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
isCoequalizer Af Ag monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow
  monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow_eq
 
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: category_of_monad_algebra M
h: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, W ⟧
p: Af · h = Ag · h
∃! φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
       ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, W ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = h

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: category_of_monad_algebra M
h: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, W ⟧
p: Af · h = Ag · h
isaprop
  (∑
   φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
       ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, W ⟧,
   monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = h)

σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M

Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧

p: Af · h = Ag · h
∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, W ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = h

          
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: category_of_monad_algebra M
h: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, W ⟧
p: Af · h = Ag · h
isaprop
  (∑
   φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
       ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, W ⟧,
   monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = h)
 exact (monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ump_unique (pr2 W) (pr2 h)).

pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π

h: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, W ⟧
p: Af · h = Ag · h
∑
φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
    ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, W ⟧,
monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = h

pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y

AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M

Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧

Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π

h: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, W ⟧
p: Af · h = Ag · h
category_of_monad_algebra M
⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, W ⟧
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: category_of_monad_algebra M
h: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, W ⟧
p: Af · h = Ag · h
(λ φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
       ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, W ⟧,
 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = h) 
  ?pr1

            
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: category_of_monad_algebra M
h: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, W ⟧
p: Af · h = Ag · h
category_of_monad_algebra M
⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, W ⟧
 
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: category_of_monad_algebra M
h: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, W ⟧
p: Af · h = Ag · h
f · pr1 h = g · pr1 h

              exact (maponpaths pr1 p).
            
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
X, Y: hSet
hX: monad_algebra M X
hY: monad_algebra M Y
f, g: SET ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f = # M f · hY
hg: hX · g = # M g · hY
σ: SET ⟦ Y, X ⟧
hσ: hY · σ = # M σ · hX
pf: ∏ y : Y, f (σ y) = y
pg: ∏ y : Y, g (σ y) = y
AX:= X,, hX: category_of_monad_algebra M
AY:= Y,, hY: category_of_monad_algebra M
Af:= f,, hf: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Ag:= g,, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AX, AY ⟧
Aσ:= σ,, hσ: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, AX ⟧
C:= pr11 (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): hSet
π:= CoequalizerArrow (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): SET ⟦ Y, C ⟧
Cp:= CoequalizerEqAr (Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g): f · π = g · π
Coeq:= Coequalizers_HSET X Y f g: Coequalizer f g
W: category_of_monad_algebra M
h: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ AY, W ⟧
p: Af · h = Ag · h
(λ φ : category_of_monad_algebra M
       ⟦ monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ob, W ⟧,
 monad_reflexive_coequalizer_arrow · φ = h)
  (monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ump_mor (pr2 W) (pr2 h)
     (maponpaths pr1 p))
 apply monad_reflexive_coequalizer_ump_commutes.
      Defined.
    End ReflexiveCoequalizerConstruction.

    
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
reflexive_coequalizers (category_of_monad_algebra M)

    
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
reflexive_coequalizers (category_of_monad_algebra M)

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
hx, hy: category_of_monad_algebra M
hf, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hx, hy ⟧
hh: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hy, hx ⟧
pf: hh · hf = identity hy
pg: hh · hg = identity hy
Coequalizer hf hg

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
hx, hy: category_of_monad_algebra M
hf, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hx, hy ⟧
hh: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hy, hx ⟧
pf: hh · hf = identity hy
pg: hh · hg = identity hy
SET ⟦ pr1 hy, pr1 hx ⟧
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
hx, hy: category_of_monad_algebra M
hf, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hx, hy ⟧
hh: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hy, hx ⟧
pf: hh · hf = identity hy
pg: hh · hg = identity hy
∏ y : pr1 hy, pr1 hf (?σ y) = y
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
hx, hy: category_of_monad_algebra M
hf, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hx, hy ⟧
hh: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hy, hx ⟧
pf: hh · hf = identity hy
pg: hh · hg = identity hy
∏ y : pr1 hy, pr1 hg (?σ y) = y

      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
hx, hy: category_of_monad_algebra M
hf, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hx, hy ⟧
hh: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hy, hx ⟧
pf: hh · hf = identity hy
pg: hh · hg = identity hy
SET ⟦ pr1 hy, pr1 hx ⟧
 exact (pr1 hh).
      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
hx, hy: category_of_monad_algebra M
hf, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hx, hy ⟧
hh: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hy, hx ⟧
pf: hh · hf = identity hy
pg: hh · hg = identity hy
∏ y : pr1 hy, pr1 hf (pr1 hh y) = y
 exact (eqtohomot (maponpaths pr1 pf)).
      
M: Monad SET
HM: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer M
hx, hy: category_of_monad_algebra M
hf, hg: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hx, hy ⟧
hh: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ hy, hx ⟧
pf: hh · hf = identity hy
pg: hh · hg = identity hy
∏ y : pr1 hy, pr1 hg (pr1 hh y) = y
 exact (eqtohomot (maponpaths pr1 pg)).
    Defined.
  End ReflexiveCoequalizers.

  (**
   2. Binary Coproducts
   *)
  Section BinaryCoproductsEM.
    Context (RC : reflexive_coequalizers (category_of_monad_algebra M)).

    Section CoproductAlgebra.
      Context (alg_X alg_Y : category_of_monad_algebra M).

      Let F : SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
        := monad_free_alg_functor M.

      Let U : category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
        := underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M).

      Let X : hSet := underlying_of_hset_struct _ alg_X.
      Let Y : hSet := underlying_of_hset_struct _ alg_Y.

      Let XY : @BinCoproduct HSET X Y := BinCoproductsHSET X Y.
      Let ι₁ : SET ⟦ X , XY ⟧ := inl.
      Let ι₂ : SET ⟦ Y , XY ⟧ := inr.

      Let hX : monad_algebra M X := pr2 alg_X.
      Let hY : monad_algebra M Y := pr2 alg_Y.

      Let S₁ : BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
        := free_alg_coproduct M X Y.

      Let S₂ : BinCoproduct (F(U(F X))) (F(U(F Y)))
        := free_alg_coproduct M (U(F X)) (U(F Y)).

      
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y

      Defined.

      Let l : S₂ --> S₁
        := binary_coprod_algebra_left_map.

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
s · l = identity S₁

      
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
s · l = identity S₁

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
binary_coprod_algebra_section
· binary_coprod_algebra_left_map = identity S₁

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· (binary_coprod_algebra_section
   · binary_coprod_algebra_left_map) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₁ · identity S₁

alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

BinCoproductIn1 S₁ · binary_coprod_algebra_section
· binary_coprod_algebra_left_map = BinCoproductIn1 S₁

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· BinCoproductOfArrows (category_of_monad_algebra M)
    S₁ S₂ (# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X))
    (# F (monad_free_alg_unit M Y))
· binary_coprod_algebra_left_map = BinCoproductIn1 S₁

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X) · BinCoproductIn1 S₂
· binary_coprod_algebra_left_map = BinCoproductIn1 S₁

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

· (BinCoproductIn1 S₂ · binary_coprod_algebra_left_map) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₁

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X)
· (BinCoproductIn1 S₂
   · BinCoproductOfArrows
       (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M (F X))
       (monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y))) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₁

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X)
· (monad_free_alg_counit M (F X) · BinCoproductIn1 S₁) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₁

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X)
· monad_free_alg_counit M (F X) · BinCoproductIn1 S₁ =
identity (F X) · BinCoproductIn1 S₁

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X)
· monad_free_alg_counit M (F X) = identity (F X)

          exact (triangle_id_left_ad
                   (pr2 (monad_underlying_is_right_adjoint M))
                   X).

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· (binary_coprod_algebra_section
   · binary_coprod_algebra_left_map) =
BinCoproductIn2 S₁ · identity S₁
 
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· (binary_coprod_algebra_section
   · binary_coprod_algebra_left_map) =
BinCoproductIn2 S₁

BinCoproductIn2 S₁ · binary_coprod_algebra_section
· binary_coprod_algebra_left_map = BinCoproductIn2 S₁

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· BinCoproductOfArrows (category_of_monad_algebra M)
    S₁ S₂ (# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X))
    (# F (monad_free_alg_unit M Y))
· binary_coprod_algebra_left_map = BinCoproductIn2 S₁

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

· (BinCoproductIn2 S₂
   · BinCoproductOfArrows
       (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M (F X))
       (monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y))) =
BinCoproductIn2 S₁

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

# F (monad_free_alg_unit M Y)
· monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y) · BinCoproductIn2 S₁ =
identity (F Y) · BinCoproductIn2 S₁

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
# F (monad_free_alg_unit M Y)
· monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y) = identity (F Y)

          exact (triangle_id_left_ad
                   (pr2 (monad_underlying_is_right_adjoint M))
                   Y).
      Qed.

      Let sl : s · l = identity _
        := binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map.

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

· (binary_coprod_algebra_section
   · binary_coprod_algebra_right_map) =

hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· (binary_coprod_algebra_section
   · binary_coprod_algebra_right_map) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₁ · identity S₁
 
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· (binary_coprod_algebra_section
   · binary_coprod_algebra_right_map) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₁

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
BinCoproductIn1 S₁ · binary_coprod_algebra_section
· binary_coprod_algebra_right_map = BinCoproductIn1 S₁

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· BinCoproductOfArrows (category_of_monad_algebra M)
    S₁ S₂ (# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X))
    (# F (monad_free_alg_unit M Y))
· binary_coprod_algebra_right_map = BinCoproductIn1 S₁

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X)
· (BinCoproductIn1 S₂
   · BinCoproductOfArrows
       (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
       (# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X)))
       (# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y)))) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₁

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X)
· (# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X))
   · BinCoproductIn1 S₁) = BinCoproductIn1 S₁

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

· # F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X))
· BinCoproductIn1 S₁ = BinCoproductIn1 S₁

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X)
· # F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X))
· BinCoproductIn1 S₁ =
identity (F X) · BinCoproductIn1 S₁

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

identity (F X)

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
# F
  (monad_free_alg_unit M X
   · # U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X)) =
identity (F X)

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
# F
  (monad_free_alg_unit M X
   · # U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X)) =
# F (identity X)

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
monad_free_alg_unit M X
· # U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X) = identity X

          exact (triangle_id_right_ad
                   (pr2 (monad_underlying_is_right_adjoint M))
                   alg_X).
        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· (binary_coprod_algebra_section
   · binary_coprod_algebra_right_map) =
BinCoproductIn2 S₁ · identity S₁
 
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· (binary_coprod_algebra_section
   · binary_coprod_algebra_right_map) =
BinCoproductIn2 S₁

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
BinCoproductIn2 S₁ · binary_coprod_algebra_section
· binary_coprod_algebra_right_map = BinCoproductIn2 S₁

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

· BinCoproductOfArrows (category_of_monad_algebra M)
    S₁ S₂ (# F (monad_free_alg_unit M X))
    (# F (monad_free_alg_unit M Y))
· binary_coprod_algebra_right_map = BinCoproductIn2 S₁

alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

· (BinCoproductIn2 S₂
   · BinCoproductOfArrows
       (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
       (# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X)))
       (# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y)))) =
BinCoproductIn2 S₁

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

· # F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y))
· BinCoproductIn2 S₁ =
identity (F Y) · BinCoproductIn2 S₁

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

  (monad_free_alg_unit M Y
   · # U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y)) =

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
# F
  (monad_free_alg_unit M Y
   · # U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y)) =
# F (identity Y)

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
monad_free_alg_unit M Y
· # U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y) = identity Y

          exact (triangle_id_right_ad
                   (pr2 (monad_underlying_is_right_adjoint M))
                   alg_Y).
      Qed.

      Let sr : s · r = identity _
        := binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map.

      Definition binary_coprod_algebra_ob
        : Coequalizer l r
        := RC _ _ l r s sl sr.

      Let C : hSet := pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob.
      Let hC : monad_algebra M C := pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob.

      
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
μ M X · # M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hX · η M X) · μ M X · # M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
μ M X · # M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hX · η M X) · μ M X · # M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: BinCoproductIn1 S₂
· (BinCoproductOfArrows
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
     (monad_free_alg_counit M (F X))
     (monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y))
   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₂
· (binary_coprod_algebra_right_map
   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
μ M X · # M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hX · η M X) · μ M X · # M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: BinCoproductIn1 S₂
· (BinCoproductOfArrows
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
     (monad_free_alg_counit M (F X))
     (monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y))
   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₂
· (BinCoproductOfArrows
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
     (# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X)))
     (# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y)))
   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
μ M X · # M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hX · η M X) · μ M X · # M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

    (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁

# M (hX · η M X) · μ M X · # M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: monad_free_alg_counit M (F X) · BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob =
# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X))
· BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
# M (identity (M X)) · μ M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (# M (identity X) · hX · η M X) · μ M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: monad_free_alg_counit M (F X) · BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob =
# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X))
· BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
q: # M (identity (M X)) · μ M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (# M (identity X) · hX · η M X) · μ M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
μ M X · # M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hX · η M X) · μ M X · # M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: monad_free_alg_counit M (F X) · BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob =
# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X))
· BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
# M (identity (M X)) · μ M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (# M (identity X) · hX · η M X) · μ M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

          exact (maponpaths pr1 p).

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X))
· BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
q: μ M X · (# M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hX · η M X) · μ M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: monad_free_alg_counit M (F X) · BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob =
# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X))
· BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
q: μ M X · (# M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hX · η M X) · μ M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
μ M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY)
   · (μ M XY
      · pr1
          (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob))) =
μ M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY)
   · (μ M XY
      · pr1
          (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)))

        apply idpath.
      Qed.

      
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X,
binary_coprod_algebra_ob ⟧

s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
algebra_as_coequalizer_left_map M · ?h =
algebra_as_coequalizer_right_map M hX · ?h

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ monad_free_alg M X,
binary_coprod_algebra_ob ⟧
 exact (BinCoproductIn1 _ · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob).
        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
algebra_as_coequalizer_left_map M
· (BinCoproductIn1 S₁
   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
algebra_as_coequalizer_right_map M hX
· (BinCoproductIn1 S₁
   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
 abstract
            (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply homset_property | ] ;
             refine (_ @ binary_coprod_algebra_in1_eq) ;
             simpl ;
             rewrite (functor_id M) ;
             exact (maponpaths (λ z, z · _) (id_left (μ M X)))).
      Defined.

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

· (BinCoproductOfArrows
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
     (monad_free_alg_counit M (F X))
     (monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y))
   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =

   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =

· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: BinCoproductIn2 S₂
· (BinCoproductOfArrows
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
     (monad_free_alg_counit M (F X))
     (monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y))
   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
BinCoproductIn2 S₂
· (BinCoproductOfArrows
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
     (# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X)))
     (# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y)))
   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
μ M Y · # M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hY · η M Y) · μ M Y · # M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: BinCoproductIn2 S₂
· BinCoproductOfArrows
    (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
    (monad_free_alg_counit M (F X))
    (monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y))
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob =
BinCoproductIn2 S₂
· BinCoproductOfArrows
    (category_of_monad_algebra M) S₂ S₁
    (# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X)))
    (# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y)))
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
μ M Y · # M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hY · η M Y) · μ M Y · # M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob =
# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y))
· BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
μ M Y · # M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
