· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y) · BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob =
# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y))
· BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
# M (identity (M Y)) · μ M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (# M (identity Y) · hY · η M Y) · μ M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y) · BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob =
# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y))
· BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
q: # M (identity (M Y)) · μ M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (# M (identity Y) · hY · η M Y) · μ M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
μ M Y · # M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hY · η M Y) · μ M Y · # M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y) · BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob =
# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y))
· BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
# M (identity (M Y)) · μ M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (# M (identity Y) · hY · η M Y) · μ M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

          exact (maponpaths pr1 p).
        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y) · BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob =
# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y))
· BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
q: # M (identity (M Y)) · μ M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (# M (identity Y) · hY · η M Y) · μ M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
μ M Y · # M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hY · η M Y) · μ M Y · # M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

q: identity (M (M Y)) · μ M Y

# M (hY · η M Y) · μ M Y · # M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
p: monad_free_alg_counit M (F Y) · BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob =
# F (# U (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y))
· BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
q: μ M Y · (# M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
# M (hY · η M Y) · μ M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY)
· pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
μ M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY)
   · (μ M XY
      · pr1
          (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob))) =
μ M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY)
   · (μ M XY
      · pr1
          (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)))

        apply idpath.
      Qed.

      
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y,
binary_coprod_algebra_ob ⟧

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
algebra_as_coequalizer_left_map M · ?h =
algebra_as_coequalizer_right_map M hY · ?h

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ monad_free_alg M Y,
binary_coprod_algebra_ob ⟧
 exact (BinCoproductIn2 _ · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob).
        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
algebra_as_coequalizer_left_map M
· (BinCoproductIn2 S₁
   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob) =
algebra_as_coequalizer_right_map M hY
· (BinCoproductIn2 S₁
   · CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
 abstract
            (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply homset_property | ] ;
             refine (_ @ binary_coprod_algebra_in2_eq) ;
             simpl ;
             rewrite (functor_id M) ;
             exact (maponpaths (λ z, z · _) (id_left (μ M Y)))).
      Defined.

      Section UMP.
        Context {Z : category_of_monad_algebra M}
                (φ₁ : alg_X --> Z)
                (φ₂ : alg_Y --> Z).

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, Z ⟧

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ F X, Z ⟧
 exact (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁).
          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ F Y, Z ⟧
 exact (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂).
        Defined.

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
category_of_monad_algebra M
⟦ binary_coprod_algebra_ob, Z ⟧

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

 exact binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob.

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 S₂
· (l · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₂
· (r · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob)
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁

· (l · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob) =

· (r · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob)

            
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 S₂
· (l · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₂
· (r · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob)
 abstract
                (rewrite !assoc ;
                 unfold l, binary_coprod_algebra_left_map ;
                 unfold r, binary_coprod_algebra_right_map ;
                 unfold binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob ;
                 rewrite !BinCoproductOfArrowsIn1 ;
                 rewrite !assoc' ;
                 rewrite BinCoproductIn1Commutes ;
                 rewrite !assoc ;
                 apply maponpaths_2 ;
                 exact (!(nat_trans_ax (monad_free_alg_counit M) _ _ _))).
            
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 S₂
· (l · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob) =
BinCoproductIn2 S₂
· (r · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob)
 abstract
                (rewrite !assoc ;
                 unfold l, binary_coprod_algebra_left_map ;
                 unfold r, binary_coprod_algebra_right_map ;
                 unfold binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob ;
                 rewrite !BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2 ;
                 rewrite !assoc' ;
                 rewrite BinCoproductIn2Commutes ;
                 rewrite !assoc ;
                 apply maponpaths_2 ;
                 exact (!(nat_trans_ax (monad_free_alg_counit M) _ _ _))).
        Defined.

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
binary_coprod_algebra_in1
· binary_coprod_algebra_arrow = φ₁

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 alg_X) (pr2 Z))
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
pr1
  (binary_coprod_algebra_in1
   · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow) = 
pr1 φ₁

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
x: SET ⟦ pr1 alg_X, pr1 Z ⟧
isaprop (pr2 alg_X -->[ x] pr2 Z)

            apply homset_property.

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
p: η M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY) · μ M XY
   · pr1
       (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob))
· pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow = 
pr1 φ₁
pr1
  (binary_coprod_algebra_in1
   · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow) = pr1 φ₁

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY)
   · (μ M XY
      · (pr1
           (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
         · pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow))) = pr1 φ₁

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY)
   · (μ M XY
      · (pr1
           (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
         · pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow))) = ?b
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
?b = pr1 φ₁

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M X
· (# M (ι₁ · η M XY)
   · (μ M XY
      · (pr1
           (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
         · pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow))) = ?b

            
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
· pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow = ?t2

            exact (maponpaths
                     pr1
                     (CoequalizerCommutes binary_coprod_algebra_ob _ _ _)).

hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C

φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
?b = ?y'

            
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
# M ι₁ · (# M (η M XY) · μ M XY) = ?b

              
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
# M (η M XY) · μ M XY = ?t2

              exact (@Monad_law2 _ M XY).
            
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
# M ι₁ · identity (M XY) = ?y'

            apply id_right.

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
p:= maponpaths pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) 
     (F X) (F Y) S₁ Z
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)): pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1 S₁
   · BinCoproductArrow S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)) =
pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
# M ι₁ · pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob = ?t2

            
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
p:= maponpaths pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) 
     (F X) (F Y) S₁ Z
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)): pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1 S₁
   · BinCoproductArrow S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)) =
pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
# M ι₁ · pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob =
pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1 S₁
   · BinCoproductArrow S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂))

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
p:= maponpaths pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) 
     (F X) (F Y) S₁ Z
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)): pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1 S₁
   · BinCoproductArrow S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)) =
pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
# M ι₁ = pr1 (BinCoproductIn1 S₁)

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
p:= maponpaths pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) 
     (F X) (F Y) S₁ Z
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)): pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1 S₁
   · BinCoproductArrow S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)) =
pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
# M ι₁ · identity (M XY) = pr1 (BinCoproductIn1 S₁)

            
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
p:= maponpaths pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) 
     (F X) (F Y) S₁ Z
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)): pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1 S₁
   · BinCoproductArrow S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)) =
pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
# M ι₁ · identity (M XY) =
# M (inl · η M (setcoprod X Y)) · μ M (setcoprod X Y)

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

identity (M XY) =

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

p:= maponpaths pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1Commutes
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) 
     (F X) (F Y) S₁ Z

     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)): pr1
  (BinCoproductIn1 S₁
   · BinCoproductArrow S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)) =
pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
# M (η M (setcoprod X Y)) · μ M (setcoprod X Y) =
identity (M XY)

            apply (Monad_law2(T:=M)).
          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M X · pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁) =
pr1 φ₁

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M X · pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁) =
identity (functor_identity SET X) · pr1 φ₁

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M X · pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X) · pr1 φ₁ =
identity (functor_identity SET X) · pr1 φ₁

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M X · (# M (identity (pr1 alg_X)) · pr2 alg_X) =
identity X

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M X · (identity (M (pr1 alg_X)) · pr2 alg_X) =
identity X

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M X · (identity (M (pr1 alg_X)) · pr2 alg_X) = ?b
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
?b = identity X

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
identity (M (pr1 alg_X)) · pr2 alg_X = ?t2

            exact (id_left hX).
          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M X · hX = identity X

          apply monad_algebra_unit.
        Qed.

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
binary_coprod_algebra_in2
· binary_coprod_algebra_arrow = φ₂

        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

· binary_coprod_algebra_arrow = φ₂

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 alg_Y) (pr2 Z))
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
pr1
  (binary_coprod_algebra_in2
   · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow) = 
pr1 φ₂

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 alg_Y) (pr2 Z))

            
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
x: SET ⟦ pr1 alg_Y, pr1 Z ⟧
isaprop (pr2 alg_Y -->[ x] pr2 Z)

            apply homset_property.

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
p: η M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY) · μ M XY
   · pr1
       (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob))
· pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow = 
pr1 φ₂
pr1
  (binary_coprod_algebra_in2
   · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow) = pr1 φ₂

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
pr1 (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob)
· pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow = ?t2

            exact (maponpaths
                     pr1
                     (CoequalizerCommutes binary_coprod_algebra_ob _ _ _)).

alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M Y
· (# M (ι₂ · η M XY)
   · (μ M XY · pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob)) =
?b

sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M Y · (# M ι₂ · pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob) =
?b
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
?b = pr1 φ₂

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
p:= maponpaths pr1
  (BinCoproductIn2Commutes
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) 
     (F X) (F Y) S₁ Z
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)): pr1
  (BinCoproductIn2 S₁
   · BinCoproductArrow S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)) =
pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)
# M ι₂ · pr1 binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_ob = ?t2

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

  (BinCoproductIn2 S₁
   · BinCoproductArrow S₁

       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂))

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

  (BinCoproductIn2Commutes

# M ι₂ = pr1 (BinCoproductIn2 S₁)

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧

  (BinCoproductIn2Commutes

pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)
# M ι₂ · identity (M XY) =
# M ((λ x : Y, inr x) · η M (setcoprod X Y))
· μ M (setcoprod X Y)

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
p:= maponpaths pr1
  (BinCoproductIn2Commutes
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) 
     (F X) (F Y) S₁ Z
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)): pr1
  (BinCoproductIn2 S₁
   · BinCoproductArrow S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)) =
pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)
identity (M XY) =
# M (η M (setcoprod X Y)) · μ M (setcoprod X Y)

            
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
p:= maponpaths pr1
  (BinCoproductIn2Commutes
     (category_of_monad_algebra M) 
     (F X) (F Y) S₁ Z
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
     (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)): pr1
  (BinCoproductIn2 S₁
   · BinCoproductArrow S₁
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_X · φ₁)
       (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)) =
pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂)
# M (η M (setcoprod X Y)) · μ M (setcoprod X Y) =
identity (M XY)

            apply (Monad_law2(T:=M)).
          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
