ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M Y · pr1 (monad_free_alg_counit M alg_Y · φ₂) =
pr1 φ₂

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

identity (functor_identity SET Y) · pr1 φ₂

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M Y · (# M (identity (pr1 alg_Y)) · pr2 alg_Y) =
identity Y

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧

identity Y

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
identity (M (pr1 alg_Y)) · pr2 alg_Y = ?t2

            exact (id_left hY).
          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET

Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
η M Y · hY = identity Y

          apply monad_algebra_unit.
        Qed.

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   fg : category_of_monad_algebra M

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
ψ₁, ψ₂: ∑
fg : category_of_monad_algebra M
     ⟦ binary_coprod_algebra_ob, Z ⟧,
binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · fg = φ₁
× binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · fg = φ₂

⟦ binary_coprod_algebra_ob, Z ⟧
isaprop
  (binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · x = φ₁
   × binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · x = φ₂)

            apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧

× binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · fg = φ₂

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
ψ₁, ψ₂: ∑
fg : category_of_monad_algebra M
     ⟦ binary_coprod_algebra_ob, Z ⟧,
binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · fg = φ₁
× binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · fg = φ₂
BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob · pr1 ψ₁) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob · pr1 ψ₂)
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
ψ₁, ψ₂: ∑
fg : category_of_monad_algebra M
     ⟦ binary_coprod_algebra_ob, Z ⟧,
binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · fg = φ₁
× binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · fg = φ₂
BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob · pr1 ψ₁) =
BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob · pr1 ψ₂)

          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
ψ₁, ψ₂: ∑
fg : category_of_monad_algebra M
     ⟦ binary_coprod_algebra_ob, Z ⟧,
binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · fg = φ₁
× binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · fg = φ₂
BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob · pr1 ψ₁) =
BinCoproductIn1 S₁
· (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob · pr1 ψ₂)
 
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
ψ₁, ψ₂: ∑
fg : category_of_monad_algebra M
     ⟦ binary_coprod_algebra_ob, Z ⟧,
binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · fg = φ₁
× binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · fg = φ₂
η M X
· pr1
    (BinCoproductIn1 S₁
     · (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
        · pr1 ψ₁)) =
η M X
· pr1
    (BinCoproductIn1 S₁
     · (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
        · pr1 ψ₂))

            exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 ψ₁ @ !(pr12 ψ₂))).
          
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
ψ₁, ψ₂: ∑
fg : category_of_monad_algebra M
     ⟦ binary_coprod_algebra_ob, Z ⟧,
binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · fg = φ₁
× binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · fg = φ₂
BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob · pr1 ψ₁) =
BinCoproductIn2 S₁
· (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob · pr1 ψ₂)
 
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
ψ₁, ψ₂: ∑
fg : category_of_monad_algebra M
     ⟦ binary_coprod_algebra_ob, Z ⟧,
binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · fg = φ₁
× binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · fg = φ₂
η M Y
· pr1
    (BinCoproductIn2 S₁
     · (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
        · pr1 ψ₁)) =
η M Y
· pr1
    (BinCoproductIn2 S₁
     · (CoequalizerArrow binary_coprod_algebra_ob
        · pr1 ψ₂))

            exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 ψ₁ @ !(pr22 ψ₂))).
        Qed.
      End UMP.

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
category_of_monad_algebra M
 exact binary_coprod_algebra_ob.
        
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X,
binary_coprod_algebra_ob ⟧
 exact binary_coprod_algebra_in1.

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁

hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
isBinCoproduct (category_of_monad_algebra M) alg_X
  alg_Y binary_coprod_algebra_ob
  binary_coprod_algebra_in1 binary_coprod_algebra_in2
 
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
∃! fg : category_of_monad_algebra M
        ⟦ binary_coprod_algebra_ob, Z ⟧,
binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · fg = φ₁
× binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · fg = φ₂

r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧

  (∑

   binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · fg = φ₁
   × binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · fg = φ₂)

  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet

ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧

  (∑

   binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · fg = φ₁
   × binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · fg = φ₂)
 exact (binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_unique φ₁ φ₂).

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M

hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
(λ _ : binary_coprod_algebra_in1 · ?pr1 = φ₁,
 binary_coprod_algebra_in2 · ?pr1 = φ₂) 
  ?pr10

  (category_of_monad_algebra M)

S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))

RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
binary_coprod_algebra_in1
· binary_coprod_algebra_arrow φ₁ φ₂ = φ₁
 exact (binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_in1 φ₁ φ₂).
            
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
alg_X, alg_Y: category_of_monad_algebra M
F:= monad_free_alg_functor M: SET ⟶ category_of_monad_algebra M
U:= underlying_of_hset_struct (monad_to_hset_struct M): category_of_monad_algebra M ⟶ SET
X:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_X: hSet
Y:= underlying_of_hset_struct 
  (monad_to_hset_struct M) alg_Y: hSet
XY:= BinCoproductsHSET X Y: BinCoproduct X Y
ι₁:= inl: SET ⟦ X, XY ⟧
ι₂:= inr: SET ⟦ Y, XY ⟧
hX:= pr2 alg_X: monad_algebra M X
hY:= pr2 alg_Y: monad_algebra M Y
S₁:= free_alg_coproduct M X Y: BinCoproduct (F X) (F Y)
S₂:= free_alg_coproduct M (U (F X)) (U (F Y)): BinCoproduct (F (U (F X))) (F (U (F Y)))
l:= binary_coprod_algebra_left_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
r:= binary_coprod_algebra_right_map: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₂, S₁ ⟧
s:= binary_coprod_algebra_section: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ S₁, S₂ ⟧
sl:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_left_map: s · l = identity S₁
sr:= binary_coprod_algebra_section_right_map: s · r = identity S₁
C:= pr111 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: hSet
hC:= pr211 binary_coprod_algebra_ob: monad_algebra M C
Z: category_of_monad_algebra M
φ₁: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_X, Z ⟧
φ₂: category_of_monad_algebra M ⟦ alg_Y, Z ⟧
(λ _ : binary_coprod_algebra_in1
       · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow φ₁ φ₂ = φ₁,
 binary_coprod_algebra_in2
 · binary_coprod_algebra_arrow φ₁ φ₂ = φ₂)
  (binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_in1 φ₁ φ₂)
 exact (binary_coprod_algebra_arrow_in2 φ₁ φ₂).
      Defined.
    End CoproductAlgebra.

    
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
BinCoproducts (category_of_monad_algebra M)

    
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
BinCoproducts (category_of_monad_algebra M)

      
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
hx, hy: category_of_monad_algebra M
BinCoproduct hx hy

      exact (binary_coprod_algebra hx hy).
    Defined.
  End BinaryCoproductsEM.

  (**
   3. Coequalizers
   *)
  
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
Coequalizers (category_of_monad_algebra M)

  
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
Coequalizers (category_of_monad_algebra M)

    
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
reflexive_coequalizers (category_of_monad_algebra M)
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
BinCoproducts (category_of_monad_algebra M)

    
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
reflexive_coequalizers (category_of_monad_algebra M)
 exact RC.
    
M: Monad SET
RC: reflexive_coequalizers
  (category_of_monad_algebra M)
BinCoproducts (category_of_monad_algebra M)
 exact (monad_algebra_binary_coproducts RC).
  Defined.
End MonadToStruct.
